feedback.text: Europe is the best place to be a consumer because of laws and policies like this one,however we can do more on behalf of consumers,just like me.I think that we should introduce a line in this act to stop videogame developers,to "kill" videogames as soon as they decide.Labeling a game as a "live service" is a shady business practice and this is the main argument they make.EU Comission should intervene in this clear overreach-a good you sold as a product,cannot be taken away from consumers.Many games dissapear over night from gamers library,games we bought as products,not as an monthly subscription.Please consider adding a line to this act to protect us from beeing "stolen" of whats rightfully bought.For more details please inspect the Stop Destroying Videogames Initiative,a petition with over 1 million signatures. Thank you
